content: *물약, 희귀* --- 이 물약의 용기는 비어 있는 듯 보이나, 손으로 들면 액체가 담겨있음을 느낄 수 있습니다. 이 물약을 마시면 1시간 동안 [투명](/1def7f5a1e80819b8679edcccaa3b420?pvs=25) 상태가 됩니다. 명중 굴림을 하거나, 피해를 주거나, 주문을 시전하면 투명 효과가 즉시 종료됩니다. --- ![](https://prod-files-secure.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/8dffc202-0f6e-4adf-b208-fc378f0d8bf3/28374ca2-256b-407c-8e00-643c23f19918/638657413893589864.png?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Content-Sha256=UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD&X-Amz-Credential=ASIAZI2LB46635ERB4GJ%2F20260616%2Fus-west-2%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20260616T093202Z&X-Amz-Expires=3600&X-Amz-Security-Token=IQoJb3JpZ2luX2VjEKf%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2FwEaCXVzLXdlc3QtMiJHMEUCIFLuyjBJNsjTiMs%2BAz%2FDhGMOXAmEMC5dpshtVajN6A9GAiEAiIOUAKAEwn%2FrjMRKgYnXch5yhmQ9DaGtp5JWAl0%2FZj0q%2FwMIcBAAGgw2Mzc0MjMxODM4MDUiDE9ATw60D1misMUmtyrcA5%2FVS9ghrsdMc7%2FL7D2O36IpqtU2E3EusZOedsLc%2FG45kAWGIjpRlkzq%2FbwnnikwlNzLp3NM5c0p5DHAtZ1DtNI0DHBbxG%2B%2BXDd%2B5G5enRReYR1OxxMCBQQaSsUUokC%2Fm%2Fot199QfrzxxI2zIqXsGiYDor7NKAdfdzFInkGIsgC%2F9mU6ADGX8S7GGu53ygfoqz%2B2eq8hKsusY%2FKtnM4ckYXac8uRsBarFL7PaMO8SosPGHdxi5U43VPbben6p8llhmIRsqKW3gs7bYN74l63rBsaYgr937t%2B%2FizENP0tKAdTIWwbMHQOSGUkx%2BM25YSFMGvJLLbOsdyvYqcBbOry78l99Owtb29Jnpdtd6%2F30%2FkLikSY%2BlSeWPt6MrVsO6bPnHOf2w%2Bq41IjjjG1q6Yu5os5bW0EliZRJxf3u6eAn%2BQRaA%2BZKTE%2FmTdNr10qCZVQwhJylUY9noscKEoSRk4jCJh4Wgy48GJY8mAz%2B9pncZFkuDGUzUjRzTyyuhlE8rw9ZHVf2k8liOqqxUsOlCYQfRvGmjXiG6i8lLj4KKl4hmEWUjtlULQYLtlxZfQ5ZyJulofYRVV6D3PmBf2PditRvjvUEsBKJyUenvjSQIznp0tzvVaV4xohZ6wE9WmHMOXcw9EGOqUBsIcqR2lBalGohANcfDYgIcRQsmba1714dGWFHPPM%2FSkzPMy4ipPvD6OB4pJ7aQp0WWNWE%2FHVguICHhuLjWxmdmh8fwSvZXcZSaHKkXYNlrhYNTfPYQQgUe3MvFuyKnAdR1PBlRrov3szyFq18q58Bp5KJzcTc1kwtKP4imPGlrAdkaX2FbIZaKPe3UDgYta0%2FXfQT5IeX3OXNgvTU023H4vYITDI&X-Amz-Signature=d5e6867dd7c67231721acf33c6dd0f083b5e6685aff3a21c818afc6c636af316&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&x-amz-checksum-mode=ENABLED&x-id=GetObject)
